'''Fervse'dra''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] in the [[Both system]] between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Taboth]] and [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. The word translated to "[[Stone Clan|clan of stones]]" in [[Bothese|Bothan]].<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

It was formed millions of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], when the unstable third planet of the [[star system/Legends|system]] was broke apart. Even though its [[asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] were poor in rare [[Metal/Legends|metals]], there have been some [[mining/Legends|mining]] attempts.<ref name="guide" />
